insight:
You've got a clean slate ahead of you, and every session is an opportunity to start fresh and set a positive tone - let's focus on building a strong foundation by dedicating 15 minutes a day to learning, starting today.

This focused effort will give you the momentum needed to see consistent progress and improvement, as you start with small wins and a 100% completion rate, giving you a strong foundation to build upon.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
